title: International Weddings - Bridging Cultures with Better Together

intro.paragraph1: Your love knows no borders? Then your wedding shouldn't either! Whether German-Moroccan, German-Venezuelan, or Luxembourgish-Indian - we've already brought the most diverse cultural combinations to life. We've even technically coordinated a four-language ceremony in German, English, French, and Arabic.
intro.paragraph2: Our secret? We build bridges between cultures! Jonathan finds songs that both cultures know - from Punjabi MC to Stromae - and creates special moments where all your guests can dive into new dance traditions together.
intro.paragraph3: No experience yet with your cultural combination? Even more exciting! As a true music lover, Jonathan is always curious about new traditions and sounds. We love learning something new and turn every new culture into a special experience for all your guests.

seo.title: International Weddings - DJ for Binational Couples | Better Together
seo.description: German-Moroccan, German-Venezuelan, or multilingual? Better Together brings your cultures together on the dance floor - as a DJ duo for international weddings in Berlin and Brandenburg.
seo.ogTitle: International Weddings with Better Together DJ
seo.ogDescription: We bridge cultures on the dance floor - DJ duo for international and binational weddings in Berlin and Brandenburg.
